title: Senior Doctor - Becton Dickinson India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Becton Dickinson India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Becton Dickinson India in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!
